phase_name: Phase 2 - Construção de Módulos (13 modules, 3 batches parallel)

completed_work.details: All 6 ADRs (0005-0007) deployed to production, tested, verified
Ready to execute 5 tasks (POPs, NC, Auditoria, Rules, Deploy)

remaining_tasks.name: POPs Module UI Implementation
remaining_tasks.details: Create types.ts, popsService.ts, UI components (POPsList, CreatePOPModal, TrainingAssignmentUI), tests >80%

remaining_tasks.name: Não-Conformidade + CAPA Module UI
remaining_tasks.details: Create types.ts, ncService.ts, UI components (NCList, NCDetailModal, CAPAWorkflow, SeverityGateUI), tests >80%

remaining_tasks.name: Auditoria Interna Module UI
remaining_tasks.details: Create types.ts, auditoriaService.ts, UI components, auto-NC creation, tests >80%

remaining_tasks.name: Firestore Rules Deployment + Integration Tests
remaining_tasks.details: Deploy rules, run 3 smoke test scenarios, verify no permission errors

remaining_tasks.name: Production Deployment + Final Verification
remaining_tasks.details: Type-check, build, deploy to prod, create BATCH1-COMPLETION.md, update STATE.md

decisions.rationale: Batch 2 and 3 can execute simultaneously with Batch 1 after stabilization

decisions.decision: Pause before Batch 1 execution due to context limits
decisions.rationale: Context at 75% — resuming in fresh session with full 200K budget is safer and faster

next_action: Fresh session: /gsd-execute-phase 2 --wave 1 (executes Batch 1 Task 1-5 sequentially with checkpoints)
context_notes: Phase 1 shipped in one massive sprint (Wave 3 ADR 0007 deployment). Phase 2 is equally ambitious but parallelizable. Batch 1 tasks are self-contained: POPs and NC are ADR-level integrations (not new patterns), Auditoria is straightforward audit + auto-NC. All inputs from Phase 1 ADRs are live and tested. Rules deployment is low-risk (templates exist). Recommend executing all 5 tasks in one session after fresh start.

git_state.last_commit: 606da14: docs: Phase 2 Batch 1 paused at start — context limit reached
